title: Massive List of Electors data breach was inevitable — the UCP's law-bending style of politics made it so
author: David Climenhaga
notes: FINDING TOOL ONLY (albertapolitics.ca = tier 4 per HANDOFF_v3, do not cite as source_ref). Opinion. Notes privacy commissioner Diane McLeod statement and the PIPA-exemption-for-parties problem; links Nally matter to broader pattern. Use to locate Tier 1/2 sources.
